message:
style(scheduler): if-let→match for stored task lookup + drop local lock explicitly

- Convert if-let/else chain to match for readability in the global→local
  stored task probe
- Add explicit drop(local) before parker.unpark() in the local scheduling
  path to make lock release visually obvious

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
